weather: cold rain beneath a copper sky
a hot wind carrying gray ash
still air before an unnatural frost
dominant_features: a line of toppled giant statues
a river running uphill at dusk
a crater filled with blue reeds
resources: clean spring water beneath red stones
travel_hazards: sucking mud concealed by pale moss
razor grass that cuts exposed skin
paths that subtly return travelers to their start
animal_encounters: three giant moths feeding on salt
a pack of silent red dogs
monster_encounters: a hungry troll under a skin cloak
a young wyvern with a broken wing
npc_encounters: a wounded courier hiding a sealed message
salt merchants with one empty wagon
a deserter carrying a noble's sword
pilgrims who refuse to show their faces
landmarks: a shrine made from ship ribs
an enormous sword driven into the earth
a door standing alone in a field
a circle of warm black stones
tracks_and_signs: Fresh prints circle the path but never cross it
Birds rise ahead in complete silence
The smell of hot iron drifts against the wind
A dropped bundle still contains warm food
Every nearby insect begins chirping in rhythm
camp_events: someone circles the camp without approaching
a sleeper speaks in an unknown language
